data.title: Wall Street closes in the red amid fears of US involvement in war after Iran’s retaliation
data.description:

data.title: Coinbase Eyes $330B Corporate Bitcoin Wave; Warns of Imminent Systemic Shock
data.description:
Coinbase has issued an optimistic forecast for crypto in H2 2025, projecting new Bitcoin highs. It links growing corporate allocations, aided by fresh accounting rules, to price gains, yet flags systemic threats from debt-funded treasuries and potential forced selling.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/coinbase-predicts-massive-2025-crypto-rally-but-warns-of-systemic-risk-brewing-in-corporate-bitcoin/

data.title: Trump Reportedly Amassed $1B From Crypto in Nine Months
data.description:
Catenaa, Friday, June 13, 2025- US President Donald Trump has reportedly earned an estimated $1 billion from cryptocurrency activities over the past nine months, according to a Forbes report published June 5. The report states Trump’s net worth has risen to approximately $5. 6 billion, with about $900 million in liquid assets largely driven by crypto […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/donald-trump-amasses-1-billion-from-crypto-ventures-in-nine-months
